sketches.mechanism: A recursive bottom value with a fully polymorphic type can inhabit any type in a non-strict language, but diverges when evaluated.
sketches.resonance: What never becomes present can promise to be anything.

sketches.mechanism: A weak reference is automatically set to nil when no strong reference keeps the object alive.
sketches.resonance: What is not held strongly is erased without an explicit farewell.

sketches.mechanism: A context manager suppresses an exception when __exit__ returns True.
sketches.resonance: A boundary can receive a breakage and decide that nothing happened.
sketches.draft:
class Silence:
    def __enter__(self): return self
    def __exit__(self, t, v, b): return True

with Silence():
    1 / 0
